title: She passed high school math with A’s and B’s. In college, she had to start over.
summary_en: Cecilia Lopez Alvarado was scrolling through Reddit one evening in her dorm room when she came across a thread about students at the University of California San Diego who struggled with basic math.
title_cn: She passed high school math with A’s and B’s. In college, she had to start over.

title: AI as a scaffold for learning: From access to judgment
summary_en: Meaningful learning should not be about memorization or developing the ability to solve problems for which solutions are already known.  Rather, it should focus on doing, experiencing, questioning and deciding, engaging with ideas in context, testing them against reality, and developing the ability to act thoughtfully under conditions of uncertainty.
title_cn: AI as a scaffold for learning: From access to judgment
